pages.text: Inspired by Draconic Evolution's energy crystals, Transmit Crystals provide $(l)wireless point-to-point mana transfer$() between Mana Reservoirs.$(br2)Place the crystal $(l)on top of$() any Mana Reservoir (regular or greater). It links to the reservoir below as one endpoint of a P2P connection.

$(l)Binding crystals:$()$(br)1. Craft a $(l)Mana Crystal Binder$() (1 blaze rod + 2 transcend ingots + 1 refined crystal).$(br)2. Right-click crystal A → start point selected.$(br)3. Right-click crystal B → bidirectional bind.$(br2)$(l)Maximum range:$() 64 blocks.$(br)$(l)Transfer rate:$() 32 mana per 10 ticks.$(br2)$(l)Unbinding:$() sneak + right-click a crystal.

$(l)Crafting recipe (Transmit Crystal):$()$(br)4 Refined Magic Crystal + 1 Transcend Ingot + 1 Gold Block in cross pattern → 2 crystals.$(br2)$(l)Why it's better than Mana Spreader:$()$(br)No need to aim — crystals work wirelessly. No flying bolt particles cluttering the world. Self-healing (auto-unbind if partner removed).
